text_original: 这不是谁的主场，这是我的主场
text_en: This is not someone else's home ground. This is my home ground.

text_original: 更希望的是团结，团结一心一致对外
text_en: What matters to me even more is unity—-staying united and facing outward together.
evidence_span: What matters to me even more is unity—staying united and facing outward together.

text_en: I strongly agree. I have been deeply affected by it.
source_context: 赛后采访回应“体育饭圈”问题
evidence_span: I strongly agree. I have been deeply affected by it.

text_original: 我希望后面还有更多的挑战，去等待着我和我们，希望能一次一次地证明自己
text_en: I hope there will be more challenges ahead for me and for us, and that I can prove myself again and again.
evidence_span: I hope there will be more challenges ahead for me and for us, and that I can prove myself again and again.

text_original: 在大家质疑中国乒乓球男队的时候，自己也想为男队站出来出一口气
text_en: When people were doubting the Chinese men's table tennis team, I also wanted to step up for the team and fight back.
evidence_span: I also wanted to step up for the team and fight back

text_en: I hope there is still a long road ahead for us.
evidence_span: I hope there is still a long road ahead for us.

text_en: My goal goes far beyond this.
evidence_span: My goal goes far beyond this.

text_original: 当拿到这个冠军的时候，也就是自己重新开始的时候
text_en: When I won this title, it also felt like a moment to begin again.
evidence_span: When I won this title, it also felt like a moment to begin again.
